Politics.headline: Trump Claims Ceasefire Between Israel and Lebanon to Begin Within Hours
Politics.detail: President Donald Trump announced a 10-day ceasefire agreement between Israel and Lebanon, which went into effect Thursday evening, while Pakistani mediators are working to extend a U.S.-Iran ceasefire and arrange new talks.

Politics.headline: GOP Holds With Trump on Iran War, but Cracks Emerge as Deadline Nears
Politics.detail: Republicans are largely sticking with President Trump's approach to the Iran war, but some divisions are appearing as a deadline approaches.

Politics.headline: Transition Period After UK-EU SPS Agreement Rejected in Government's Response to EFRA Report
Politics.detail: The UK government has rejected the recommendation to seek a transition period for farmers, growers, and businesses affected by a sanitary and phytosanitary (SPS) agreement with the EU. The EFRA Committee expressed disappointment, stating that the sector needs support amid disruptive changes.

Politics.headline: Singapore Won't Be Too Tight on AI or Let It 'Run Wild': DPM Gan at US Forum
Politics.detail: Singapore is aiming for a balance in AI governance, seeking regulations that are neither overly restrictive nor too permissive, according to Deputy Prime Minister Gan Kim Yong. He made these remarks at a US forum.

Politics.headline: House Democrats Attempt Anti-Corruption Message to Gain Traction Against Trump
Politics.detail: House Democrats are trying to use an anti-corruption message to gain traction against President Trump. The specific details of this attempt were not elaborated upon in the provided context.

Finance & Economy.headline: Wall Street scales fresh record high as investors bet on end of Iran war
Finance & Economy.detail: Optimism surrounding potential peace talks between the U.S. and Iran has driven investors to push Wall Street to new record highs.

Finance & Economy.headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq hit record highs as investors shrug off Iran war fears
Finance & Economy.detail: Investors are optimistic that the war will wind down with another round of U.S.-Iran peace talks on the horizon, leading to record highs for the S&P 500 and Nasdaq.

Finance & Economy.headline: UK economy showed surprise 0.5% growth before Iran war
Finance & Economy.detail: The UK economy experienced unexpected growth of 0.5% prior to the impact of the Iran war, according to recent reports.

Finance & Economy.headline: Oil plunges below $95 as the Dow surges 1,100 in a worldwide rally following a ceasefire with Iran
Finance & Economy.detail: Following a tentative ceasefire agreement with Iran, oil prices have plummeted below $95, contributing to a global stock market rally that saw the Dow Jones Industrial Average surge by 1,100 points.

Finance & Economy.headline: Netflix Q1 2026 earnings beat: Why did Netflix stock fall despite strong results and weak forward guidance outlook?
Finance & Economy.detail: Despite strong Q1 2026 earnings, Netflix stock experienced a decline due to weak forward guidance and outlook.

Technology.headline: Amazon Sues Over Refund Scam Involving GPUs, Laptops
Technology.detail: The e-commerce giant is targeting the leader of the RBK scam ring, who allegedly used elaborate, fake police reports about missing packages to trick Amazon customer service into issuing refunds.

Technology.headline: Starlink Mobile Goes Roaming As Rogers Adds US Access for Canadians
Technology.detail: The announcement suggests SpaceX's partner, T-Mobile, might eventually offer the same cross-border access for US customers.

Technology.headline: Spotify Overhauls iPad, Android Tablet Apps to Help You Be a Better DJ
Technology.detail: The new design, rolling out today for iPads and Android tablets, adds a sidebar to control what you're currently playing while browsing the rest of the app, among other updates.

Technology.headline: EU warns Meta that WhatsApp AI fee breaches antitrust rules, orders rollback
Technology.detail: The European Union has warned Meta that its new fees for WhatsApp's AI features violate antitrust regulations and has ordered the company to reverse the policy.

Technology.headline: Rackspace Technology to Announce First Quarter 2026 Earnings on May 7, 2026
Technology.detail: Rackspace Technology will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, and host a conference call to discuss the results.

Science.headline: 780,000-Year-Old Charcoal Reveals How Early Humans Mastered Fire
Science.detail: Analysis of charcoal found at an archaeological site suggests that early humans in Israel had mastered fire technology much earlier than previously thought, approximately 780,000 years ago.

Science.headline: A strange 'neutrino force' helped heal a crack in particle physics
Science.detail: A new theoretical framework proposes a 'neutrino force' that could explain anomalies in neutrino physics and potentially resolve tensions within the Standard Model of particle physics.

Science.headline: Monkeys navigate a virtual forest with thought alone, pushing brain-computer interfaces beyond the lab.
Science.detail: Researchers have demonstrated that monkeys can navigate a virtual forest using only their thoughts, showcasing the potential of brain-computer interfaces to restore mobility and function in humans.

Science.headline: Rogue 'zombie' immune cells may drive aging and fatty liver disease
Science.detail: A new study reveals that a specific type of senescent immune cell accumulates with age and high cholesterol, contributing to inflammation and potentially driving aging and fatty liver disease.

Science.headline: Industrial chemical leaks could push ozone layer recovery back by 7 years
Science.detail: Unexpectedly high emissions of certain industrial chemicals, still permitted for use, are leaking into the atmosphere and could delay the full recovery of the ozone layer by as much as seven years.

Health.headline: Trump Nominates Former Deputy Surgeon General as CDC Director
Health.detail: U.S. President Donald Trump said on Thursday he would nominate Erica Schwartz, who had served as deputy surgeon general during the COVID-19 pandemic, to become director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.

Health.headline: Patients Sue Two More Health Systems Over AI Scribe Use
Health.detail: Patients are suing two more health systems over the use of AI scribes. The lawsuits raise concerns about privacy and data security in healthcare settings.

Health.headline: One in 10 Pharmacies Cloned by Fake Jab Sellers
Health.detail: Fake jab sellers have cloned one in ten pharmacies. This poses a significant risk to public health.

Health.headline: Physical Health Key to Seniors' Mental Health
Health.detail: A recent study indicates a strong connection between physical and mental well-being in senior citizens. Maintaining physical health can significantly improve mental health outcomes for older adults.

Health.headline: Reddit Analysis Uncovers Unreported GLP-1 Side Effects
Health.detail: A recent study using AI to analyze Reddit posts has revealed potential new side effects of GLP-1 weight loss drugs. This highlights the role of social media in identifying previously unreported drug reactions.

Sports.headline: Aberg grabs one-stroke lead at RBC Heritage, Scheffler five back
Sports.detail: Ludvig Aberg leads the RBC Heritage golf tournament by one stroke, while Scottie Scheffler is five strokes behind. The tournament is currently underway.

Sports.headline: God, destiny, Griezmann: Atletico target rare Copa del Rey success
Sports.detail: Atletico Madrid is aiming for a rare Copa del Rey success, with Antoine Griezmann playing a key role. The team's performance and Griezmann's contributions are central to their aspirations.

Sports.headline: AFP Sports Agenda for Friday, April 17
Sports.detail: The AFP Sports Agenda includes Serie A leaders Inter hosting Cagliari, Coventry nearing a Premier League return, Shelton facing Fonseca at the Munich ATP event, and two NBA play-in games. The agenda covers various football leagues, tennis, and basketball events.

Sports.headline: Bronny and LeBron James are looking forward to postseason playing time together with the Lakers.
Sports.detail: Bronny and LeBron James are anticipating playing together in the postseason with the Lakers. Their potential collaboration is a key storyline for the team.

Sports.headline: MLB umpire Brock Ballou assaulted in Philadelphia as second violent attack within minutes raises concern.
Sports.detail: MLB umpire Brock Ballou was assaulted in Philadelphia, marking the second violent incident within minutes and raising concerns. The incident highlights growing safety issues.

Entertainment.headline: Tom Holland Declares Zendaya 'Looks Amazing' as They Step Out in Paris Amid Marriage Speculation
Entertainment.detail: Tom Holland tells fans Zendaya 'looks amazing' as they step out ahead of her "The Drama' premiere in Paris amid marriage speculation.

Entertainment.headline: Bill Cosby Found Liable in Sexual Assault Case, Owes Victim $59M
Entertainment.detail: Bill Cosby is ordered to pay $59 million in damages to Donna Motsinger for drugging and assaulting her in 1972.

Entertainment.headline: 'Top Gun 3' Confirmed at CinemaCon
Entertainment.detail: A third 'Top Gun' movie is in the works with Tom Cruise at Paramount, as announced at CinemaCon 2026.

Entertainment.headline: Ryan Gosling leads 'Project Hail Mary' | AP interview
Entertainment.detail: Ryan Gosling didn't set off on his latest space odyssey in just a boring astronaut suit, crediting his kids and Val Kilmer for his stylish astro-nerd look in the sci-fi film, 'Project Hail Mary'. He spoke with AP entertainment journalist Leslie Ambriz alongside co-star Sandra Hüller, directors Phil Lord and Christopher Miller, writer Drew Goddard and book author Andy Weir.

Entertainment.headline: Disney shows the opening of 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' at CinemaCon.
Entertainment.detail: Director Jon Favreau has debuted the opening of the first Star Wars movie in seven years at CinemaCon in Las Vegas.

Crime & Justice.headline: Former Va. Lt. Gov. Justin Fairfax fatally shot wife, then himself inside Virginia home, police say
Crime & Justice.detail: Police in Virginia say that former Lt. Gov. Justin Fairfax shot and killed his wife before turning the gun on himself in a murder-suicide that occurred in their home.

Crime & Justice.headline: Police officers charged following fatal road collision in south east London
Crime & Justice.detail: The Crown Prosecution Service has announced that police officers have been charged following a fatal road collision.

Crime & Justice.headline: Prosecutors in Bahrain file charges over the death of a man detained by domestic spy agency.
Crime & Justice.detail: Prosecutors in Bahrain have filed charges regarding the death of a man who was detained by a domestic spy agency.

Crime & Justice.headline: Quakertown Police cleared of wrongdoing during clash with student protesters.
Crime & Justice.detail: Quakertown Police came under scrutiny after a violent clash with high school protesters in February, but an after-action report concluded that the officers acted with restraint, even though a higher level of force was justified.

Crime & Justice.headline: Three people now face charges in Amherst fatal shooting, police say.
Crime & Justice.detail: Following a fatal shooting in Amherst, N.S., police have arrested two suspects this week and continue searching for a third suspect.

Education.headline: SupplySide Connect New Jersey 2026 Advances Health and Wellness Through Industry Connections and Curated Education
Education.detail: Informa Markets' SupplySide Connect New Jersey concluded two days of exhibition and education, fostering connections among industry professionals and experts, while spotlighting critical topics such as women's and men's health, longevity and healthy aging, cognitive function, and gut health.

Education.headline: UNESCO calls for nominations for the 2026 International Literacy Prizes
Education.detail: UNESCO is seeking nominations for the 2026 International Literacy Prizes.

Education.headline: 45 Million Children at Risk: Webinar Highlights Toll of Middle East Crisis on Children and Education
Education.detail: A UNESCO webinar highlighted the devastating impact of the Middle East crisis on children and their access to education, with 45 million children at risk.

Education.headline: Global Education News: Why the 2026 Crisis is Changing Schools
Education.detail: Global Education News reports a concerning trend as the number of out-of-school children has climbed for the seventh consecutive year, reaching 273 million, and the gap between schooling and learning is widening, leading to a 'foundational learning crisis'.

Education.headline: Vote delayed on four new virtual schools, after State Board of Education members raise concerns
Education.detail: The North Carolina State Board of Education delayed a vote on four proposed new virtual schools due to concerns about the quality of education they provide, highlighting growing scrutiny of virtual learning outcomes.

Lifestyle.headline: Red hair gene favoured by natural selection over last 10,000 years, study finds
Lifestyle.detail: A recent study indicates that the gene responsible for red hair has been favored by natural selection over the past 10,000 years.

Lifestyle.headline: Disney's Animal Kingdom adding 9 new attractions in big makeover
Lifestyle.detail: Disney's Animal Kingdom is set to undergo a significant transformation with the addition of nine new attractions.

Lifestyle.headline: Indian Family Faces Police Action In Japan Over Late Kimono Return
Lifestyle.detail: An Indian family in Japan is facing potential police action due to the delayed return of a rented kimono.

Lifestyle.headline: Golf brands race to cash in on Masters week style with Augusta-inspired drops, minus the iconic logo
Lifestyle.detail: Golf brands are capitalizing on the popularity of Masters week by releasing Augusta-inspired apparel and accessories, while carefully avoiding the use of the event's iconic logo.

Lifestyle.headline: IPL 2026 | This Chennai groom's CSK-themed wedding invite is winning hearts
Lifestyle.detail: A groom in Chennai has gained attention for his creative wedding invitation designed with a Chennai Super Kings (CSK) theme, referencing the 2026 Indian Premier League.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The Guardian view on a ceasefire for Lebanon: Trump has promised a pause. Civilians need real peace.
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The editorial discusses the need for a genuine and lasting ceasefire in Lebanon, emphasizing that civilians require more than just a temporary pause in the conflict.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The Guardian view on drugs in prisons: the chief inspector has sounded the alarm – ministers must act.
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This editorial urges ministers to take action on the issue of drugs in prisons, following concerns raised by the chief inspector.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Adam Zivo: Orbán's fall is a win for conservatism
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The author argues that Viktor Orbán's recent political defeat is a positive development for conservatism, clarifying that Orbán's policies and ideology were not truly aligned with conservative principles.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Express View on delimitation and Women's Reservation Bill: Making history needs more than a tearing hurry.
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This editorial discusses the delimitation process and the Women's Reservation Bill, arguing that thoughtful consideration is required to make meaningful progress.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Josh Brodesky: The moral of Tony Gonzales' downfall is the lack of morality in our politics.
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The author reflects on the political downfall of Tony Gonzales, suggesting it highlights a broader issue of declining moral standards in contemporary politics.

World.headline: Israel and Lebanon begin ceasefire, Trump says Iran may meet US over weekend
World.detail: A 10-day ceasefire has been agreed between Israel and Lebanon, with President Trump suggesting that US-Iran talks may occur soon. The ceasefire began at midnight local time.

World.headline: Taiwan Stock Market Tops US$4 Trillion, Surpasses UK
World.detail: Driven by technology shares, Taiwan's stock market has exceeded a total market capitalization of $4 trillion, surpassing the UK to become the world's seventh-largest. The TAIEX index sharply rebounded, reaching record highs due to rising AI hardware demand.

World.headline: US completes withdrawal from key base in Syria as part of a larger drawdown
World.detail: U.S. forces have completed their withdrawal from Qasrak air base in Syria's Hasakah province, with the Syrian army now controlling most military sites where the U.S. military was once deployed. The withdrawal is part of a deal between the Syrian government and the Kurdish-led Syrian Democratic Forces.

World.headline: Russia Launches Wave of Attacks on Ukraine
World.detail: Russia launched missiles and drones at Ukrainian cities, including Kyiv, Dnipro, and Odesa, resulting in casualties and significant damage, marking one of the deadliest attacks on Ukrainian civilians this year. In response, Ukrainian forces attacked Russia's Swaps port, causing a large fire.

World.headline: More than £1bn pledged for Sudan as humanitarian crisis deepens
World.detail: Amid a deepening humanitarian crisis, more than £1 billion has been pledged for Sudan. The pledges come as the international community seeks to address the escalating needs in the country.

Zimbabwe.headline: Minibus taxi catches fire in Zimbabwe, killing several people
Zimbabwe.detail: A minibus taxi in southwest Zimbabwe caught fire on a highway, killing approximately 18 people near Bulawayo. Police are still investigating the cause of the fire.

Zimbabwe.headline: 18 feared dead after kombi bursts into flames on Bulawayo–Beitbridge road
Zimbabwe.detail: A kombi (minibus) caught fire on the Bulawayo-Beitbridge road, with approximately 18 fatalities reported. The incident is under investigation.

Zimbabwe.headline: Police step up presence in Mabvuku, Marlborough amid slope in robberies
Zimbabwe.detail: Police have increased their presence in the Mabvuku and Marlborough suburbs due to a rise in robbery cases. Authorities are working to curb the increase in criminal activity in these areas.

Zimbabwe.headline: National Dam Levels Surge to 93.4% as 98 Reservoirs Reach Full Capacity
Zimbabwe.detail: National dam levels in Zimbabwe have risen to 93.4%, with 98 reservoirs reaching full capacity. This increase in water levels is expected to improve water security for irrigation and domestic use.

Zimbabwe.headline: Salary 'insult' forces strike
Zimbabwe.detail: Workers have initiated a strike due to dissatisfaction with their salaries, which they consider to be an 'insult'. The strike highlights ongoing labor disputes and economic challenges in Zimbabwe.
